title: Started B.Tech CSBS
description: Joined TKIET Warananagar for B.Tech in Computer Science & Business Systems.

title: Tech Head – CSBS Association
description: Elected as Tech Head of CSBS Association. Started organizing coding workshops and technical events.

title: Graphic Design Head – IEDC
description: Joined IEDC Committee as Graphic Design Head. Managed all design and branding work.

title: 2nd Prize – MBA Fusion Fest 2K25
description: Won 2nd place at inter-college MBA Fusion Fest demonstrating innovation and leadership.

title: Built JalNetra
description: Developed IoT Smart Water Monitoring System with Firebase integration and real-time dashboard.

title: 3rd Prize – National Paper Presentation
description: Won 3rd prize at National Level Paper Presentation & Project Exhibition at TKIET.

title: 3rd Prize – IIT Patna Chemathon
description: Secured 3rd prize at IICHE Chemathon 2026 organized by IIT Patna, competing at national level.

title: Launched FeedoZone
description: Founded and launched FeedoZone — hyperlocal food delivery platform for rural India. First orders processed.

title: Scaling FeedoZone
description: Continuing to grow FeedoZone with new vendors, features, and expanding to more areas.
